title: Avoid use of a deprecated capability.NewPid
body:
This is reported by golangci-lint in #1967 .

(Absolutely untested.)

comments.body:
LGTM. Dropping an explanatory breadcrumb:
```
cmd/skopeo/unshare_linux.go:25:23: SA1019: capability.NewPid is deprecated: Replace with NewPid2.  For example, replace: (staticcheck)
```

Thanks, Ed.

The quoted message is the start of a more comprehensive replacement example provided by the library: https://github.com/syndtr/gocapability/blob/42c35b4376354fd554efc7ad35e0b7f94e3a0ffb/capability/capability.go#L66-L82 ; this PR follows that recommendation.
Oh thanks, LEBTM (Looks Even Better To Me) now.
